events.title: Shimamura's Birthday
events.desc: Shimamura turns 16. Adachi is 15. They start their first year of high school together, though they haven't met yet.

events.title: They Meet on the Second Floor of the Gymnasium
events.desc: Shimamura goes to the second floor of the gymnasium for the first time and finds Adachi already there, sitting barefoot and swinging her legs. Adachi is startled, thinking she's a teacher.
quotes: "Though I didn't know it then, that had been the first day Shimamura had skipped class." (Volume 1)

events.title: First Christmas
events.desc: Adachi, who's never gone out with anyone on special occasions, spends Christmas with Shimamura for the first time. During their date, they walk around the shopping mall, play air hockey, exchange gifts, and Shimamura gives Adachi a boomerang.
quotes: "I thought it was a broken coat hanger. Either way, I accepted the blue V-shaped object. I accepted it..." (Volume 2)

events.title: First Valentine's Day and Chocolate Exchange
events.desc: Nervous about Valentine's Day, Adachi invites Shimamura to buy chocolates together. During their outing, after reading Shimamura's message: "Let's keep going, now and in the future!", Adachi, unable to contain her emotions, hugs her.
quotes: "What I mean is, I was thinking of you when I sent it. That's why it ended up like this." (Volume 3)

events.title: Second Year School Begins
events.desc: Adachi is 16 and Shimamura is 17. A new school year begins with class changes. Adachi fears the new year might separate them or change their relationship.
quotes: "Now that I think about it, this is the first time we've gone to school together, right?" (Volume 4)

events.title: Adachi's Proposal
events.desc: On the last day of the school term, Adachi tells Shimamura she wants to use summer vacation to get even closer to each other, marking the beginning of the most important summer of their lives.
quotes: "I was thinking, it would be nice if we could use summer vacation to get even closer. Yes." (Volume 5)
"It was there, with that smile, that summer began that year." (Volume 5)

events.title: Fight and Reconciliation
events.desc: During summer vacation, Adachi works at a festival booth and sees Shimamura there with an unknown girl. The image consumes her for days until everything explodes in a call with Shimamura. Later, she gathers the courage to call back and they agree to meet the next day. The reconciliation comes with flowers and a "let's be friends again", leaving Adachi both satisfied and unsatisfied at once. Afterward, they complete the list Adachi had written together.
quotes: "I think this might be the first time I've received flowers." (Volume 5)

events.title: Trip to the Countryside
events.desc: Just when Adachi has finally gotten back into rhythm with Shimamura and wants to spend time with her, Shimamura tells her she can't because her family is going to her grandparents' house for Obon.
quotes: "Oh, no, it's because we're going to my grandparents' house. You know, the Obon festival." (Volume 6)

events.title: Adachi's Confession
events.desc: Adachi finally confesses to Shimamura and tells her she loves her. After fleeing, overwhelmed by the intensity of the moment, they end up talking alone by a hotel.
quotes: "I love you." (Volume 6)

"I want you to be with me."
"I'm here."
"I want you to think of me."
"I'm thinking of you."
"I want you to look only at me." (Volume 6)
"Today's me was free to make the next decision: 'Sure, why not.'" (Volume 6)

events.title: First Day of School as Girlfriends
events.desc: Adachi shows up at Shimamura's house early in the morning in her school uniform to go to school together. It's the first day of the new term.
quotes: "Now it was September 1st. School would begin today." (Volume 7)
"You love me and I love you. Right? Simple, huh?" (Volume 7)
"Why? Because doing it was what led me to meet Shimamura. Just the idea of that caused the sun to shine over my world. For me, September was equivalent to the beginning of a new year." (Volume 7)

events.title: School Trip to Kitakyushu
events.desc: The second-year high school trip is to Kitakyushu. When groups of five are announced, Adachi jumps from her seat and runs to Shimamura's desk.
quotes: "Apparently, October was peak season for school trips for second-year high school students." (Volume 8)

events.title: Second Christmas
events.desc: Adachi and Shimamura meet under the big Christmas tree at the shopping mall, with Adachi wearing her striking Chinese dress again.
quotes: "As soon as those words left my mouth, memories of our last Christmas came rushing in. What I remembered in particular was the color blue." (Volume 9)
"That's why I need to do everything I can not to lose you, to suppress the part of me that... Yes, finds everything troublesome." (Volume 9)

events.title: New Year at the Grandparents' House
events.desc: Shimamura travels with her family to her grandparents' house to spend New Year's as is tradition. In the night garden, she planned to call Adachi to wish her a happy new year.
quotes: "We were visiting my grandparents to spend New Year's, as was our annual tradition. For me, this was my seventeenth visit." (Volume 10)

events.title: Second Valentine's Day and Saying Goodbye to Tarumi
events.desc: Shimamura meets with Tarumi before Valentine's Day and confesses she has a girlfriend, putting an end to any romantic possibility between them. Soon after, Shimamura goes with Adachi to Nagoya to buy Valentine's chocolates.
quotes: "We had decided to meet at the station. This was the second time I was meeting someone here in February. That time too, it had been with a girl. The only difference was... yes. Let's leave it at that." (Volume 10)

events.title: Beginning of Third and Final Year
events.desc: Adachi is 17 and Shimamura is 18. It's their last year together at high school.

events.season: Spring · End of Term
events.title: Plan for Final Summer Vacation
events.desc: With their last high school summer vacation approaching, Adachi proposes they go to the beach together. To afford the trip, Shimamura agrees with her parents to do household chores in exchange for money.
quotes: "Summer vacation was approaching. Our last summer vacation of high school." (Volume 12)
"Well. If you agree to do household chores during your summer vacation, I can pay you in advance." (Volume 12)

events.season: Summer · Beginning of Vacation
events.title: Shimamura's Housework
quotes: "I'm Shimamura Hougetsu. I'll be your housewife for the summer." (Volume 12)
"Look, Older Sister is doing something." (Volume 12)

events.title: Studying at Shimamura's Place
events.desc: Using studying for exams as an excuse, Adachi goes to Shimamura's house. Shimamura knows perfectly well they won't study much.
quotes: "It was the summer vacation of our third year of high school. You could almost count the days until graduation on your fingers." (Volume 11)
"I watched Adachi's finger draw circles in the air. As it slowly moved closer to me, deciding where to land, I closed my eyes." (Volume 11)
"When summer vacation ends, there will be a cultural festival, right?" (Volume 11)

events.title: Trip to the Beach
events.desc: Shimamura and Adachi go to the beach together, fulfilling their summer promise.
quotes: "Today you've been very busy. Are you going somewhere tomorrow?"
"She's going on a trip to the beach with a woman!" (Volume 12)

events.season: Summer · Early August · Obon
events.title: Visiting the Grandparents · Final Vacation
events.desc: Shimamura travels with her family to her grandparents' house for Obon, as every year. This time Yashiro also goes, disguised as a tanuki. These are the final summer vacation days of her high school life.
quotes: "Early August, during the last summer vacation of my high school life. It was the time when people returned to the countryside." (Volume 13)
"I'm also going to the countryside this year, so don't come looking for me tomorrow, okay?" (Volume 13)

events.title: School Cultural Festival
events.desc: The school term returns, along with news of a school cultural festival.
quotes: "Now it's September, and though the voice of the cicadas is barely heard anymore, it can still be heard." (Volume 13)

"A new school year begins, leaving summer behind. Two years ago, from this same point, I started deviating to the second floor of the gymnasium and even dyed my hair blonde. But thanks to those unexpected detours, I had an unexpected encounter that led me to where I am now. Perhaps that encounter is one of those that changes a life forever." (Volume 13)
